title_patterns: {number} {topic} Secrets They DON'T Want You To Know
This {topic} Changed My Life (You WON'T Believe It)
hook_patterns: WAIT! Before you scroll, watch this.
You won't believe what just happened.
Is THIS why you're still struggling with {problem}?
Everyone's talking about {viral_topic}, but they're missing THIS.
This is the ONLY {solution} you'll ever need.
My mind was blown when I discovered {secret}.
Hold up. If you do {action}, you NEED to see this.
engagement_baits: What's YOUR take on {topic}? Let me know below!
Agree or disagree? Drop a comment!
Tag a friend who needs to see this!
Which of these {options} blew your mind the most?
Is this a game changer, or overhyped? Your thoughts?
Can you relate to this? Share your story!
Save this for later if you found it useful!
What's one thing you'd add to this list?
scroll_stop_openers: You're about to discover the one thing that will change your {life/skill/habit} forever.
Here's the secret {hack/tip/method} nobody told you about {topic}.
Prepare to have your mind blown by this {fact/discovery/trick}.
If you're still doing {common_action}, you're wasting your time. Do this instead.
Don't scroll past this if you want to {achieve_desire}.
This unexpected {event/revelation} is going to reshape how you think about {topic}.
Watch till the end to see the full {transformation/reveal/trick}.
I guarantee you've never seen {this_topic} explained like this before.
retention_tricks: Fast Pacing: Quick cuts, rapid scene changes, constant motion.
Sound Design: Engaging sound effects, trending audio, dynamic music shifts.
Text Overlays: Key points highlighted with animated text, captions for accessibility.
Visual Hooks: On-screen countdowns, progress bars, mysterious objects.
Story Arc: Mini-narrative within the short, building suspense or a journey.
Direct Address: Speaker directly engages the viewer with questions or commands.
cta_formulas: Tap the link in my bio for more {value_proposition}!
Hit the like button if you learned something new!
Comment '{keyword}' and I'll send you the {resource}!
Visit my channel to watch the extended {video_type}!
